projectDescription: A single drop-in CLAUDE.md file that keeps Claude responses terse and reduces output token usage in output-heavy workflows — no code changes required.
keyFeatures: Single CLAUDE.md file — drop into any project root, zero setup
Eliminates sycophantic openers, hollow closings, and unsolicited suggestions
Removes em dashes, smart quotes, and Unicode that break parsers
Enforces think-before-acting and targeted edits over full rewrites
~63% average output token reduction on output-heavy workflows
Multiple specialized profiles for coding, agents, analysis, and benchmarks
Versioned configuration sets (v5, v6, v8) optimized for different cost/quality trade-offs
User instructions always override — never fights explicit requests
publicApiSurface: profiles/CLAUDE.coding.md — coding and code review profile
profiles/CLAUDE.agents.md — automation pipeline and multi-agent profile
profiles/CLAUDE.analysis.md — data analysis and reporting profile
profiles/J-drona23-v5/ — multi-file structured config (50 tool calls)
profiles/K-drona23-v6/ — one-shot execution config (50 tool calls)
profiles/M-drona23-v8/ — ultra-lean minimum-turn config (20 tool calls)
